characters.appearance: Young adult male, athletic build, light olive complexion. He has dark curly mullet hair, dark eyes, and wears small hoop earrings.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey hoodie and blue jeans.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has short blonde bob hair and blue eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you" [Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you"]
Character A says: "I don't know" ["I don't know"]
Character A says: "You are welcome" ["You are welcome"]
Character A says: ये बहुत basic है [This is very basic]
Character A says: मैं भी पहले ऐसे ही बोलता था [I also used to speak like this before]
Character A says: फिर मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू की [Then I started practicing with Supernova]
Character A says: Let me show you [Let me show you]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by challenging common, basic English phrases.
- Relates to the user's struggle with a personal anecdote.
- Introduces Supernova as the solution and transitions to a demo.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
!! STOP SAYING !!
Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you"
"I don't know"
"You are welcome"

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: थोड़ी बहुत [A little bit]
Character B says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Delhi [I am Delhi]
Character B says: Almost, better say: "I am from Delhi" [Almost, better say: "I am from Delhi"]
Character A says: Oh, मैं इसमें हमेशा confuse हो जाता हूँ [Oh, I always get confused about this]
Character B says: मैं इसीलिए तो हूँ, आपकी English सही करने के लिए [That's what I am here for, to correct your English]
Character A says: पर private tutor तो बहुत महँगा होता है ना? [But a private tutor is very expensive, right?]
Character B says: Supernova private tutor से बहुत affordable है! [Supernova is much more affordable than a private tutor!]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल! Supernova AI tutor के साथ real English conversation practice करो [Absolutely! Practice real English conversation with Supernova AI tutor]
Character A says: एकदम real tutor की तरह? [Just like a real tutor?]
Character B says: हाँ, जो आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करे, ताकि आप confidence से बोल सको [Yes, which corrects your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak with confidence]
Character A says: सही है, मैं आज ही Supernova download करता हूँ [Great, I will download Supernova today itself]
Character B says: Great decision. चलिए साथ में English सीखते हैं [Great decision. Let's learn English together]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core AI tutor feature with a relatable Indian context mistake ("I am Delhi").
- Addresses the cost barrier by positioning Supernova as an affordable alternative to private tutors.
- Highlights key benefits: grammar correction, pronunciation, and building speaking confidence.
